systems.system_notes: Proximal femoral cephalomedullary nailing platform for intertrochanteric, subtrochanteric, and associated proximal femur fracture fixation.

trays.tray_notes: Official TFNA materials expose dedicated proximal femoral instrumentation, surgical technique resources, and screw-only workflow guides.

components.component_notes: Official materials describe the proximal femoral nail platform for hip fracture fixation.
Official TFNA resources describe the helical blade fixation option within the proximal femoral construct.
Official TFNA resources describe lag screw fixation options and screw-only instrumentation within the platform.

unresolved_items.raw_text: The public TFNA pages expose proximal femoral implant family and technique resources but this pass does not expand the full implant code matrix.
unresolved_items.reason: A deeper IFU, inventory control form, or catalogue pass is needed for product-code detail.
unresolved_items.source_excerpt: Current extraction remains at tray and implant-family level.
